{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Principle of Fluidity
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seven Principles]] call the parallel between [[pure madra]] and water madra the [[Principle of Fluidity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
